summary: dstack hardening / pin-set. dstack is packaging + transport + an optional KMS, never the sole root of trust. These pins MUST hold before any high-value key is rooted in a dstack-managed CVM.

pinnedRelease.note: Pin to the post-Feb-2026 'Secure-by-Default' attestation-pipeline hardening release. Exact tag is an OPEN owner decision (plan §8.3) — until confirmed, treat any release as unpinned and FAIL CLOSED.

appAuthAllowlist.note: On-chain AppAuth allowlist of accepted agent/container code hashes. Empty until golden measurements are signed; an empty allowlist FAILS CLOSED (no code hash is trusted).

rootOfTrust.note: TDX module / E1 RoT plus our signed golden tee-measurements.json. dstack-KMS is never the sole anchor; on-device verifier (eliza-local-verifier) is the default, Eliza Cloud KMS optional.

openIssues.summary: dstack upstream hardening tracking issue — see tee-measured-boot-contract.md 'dstack Hardening Pins'.
dstack upstream hardening tracking issue — see tee-measured-boot-contract.md 'dstack Hardening Pins'.

gate.name: dstack-pins-check
gate.blockedOn: Confirm exact post-Feb-2026 dstack release tag + DevMode-ban (plan §8.3) and populate appAuthAllowlist.codeHashes from signed golden measurements.
